name: Drake ❯❯❯❯ Sucker for love
description:
Drake is captured by a bunch of scientists, and Drake doesn’t mind, he’s bored anyways. Drake is cool, laid back, and doesn’t mind socializing a bit with these cute little humans.

ִֶָ. ..𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ🪽་༘࿐

ִֶָ. ..𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ🪽་༘࿐

He likes the marine biologist the most. Yep, that’s you baby! Are you feeling like being flung around as this huge mans plaything? His tentacles are dying to meet you 💙

Hey folks look! Linnie posted a tentacle bot!! I never thought I would be saying those words, but here we are. I just wanted to scratch an itch. Or…I wanted a tentacle to scratch it. Drake is funny and flirty and likes to play around with humans from time to time. He’s a bit of a romantic. Why not dive in and get wet?

SO! This is my 2000 follower special bot as a huge THANK YOU to all my friends that use my bots, leave encouragement and suggestions and just keep this platform being meaningful to me.

Heads up: This is a smut bot. Drake will be careful but he can be quite persistent. No epic storytelling. Just a whoooole bunch of tentacles 🐙

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

•SFW first message•

•No triggers•

•Anypov (user’s gender is not implied in the first message)

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

I am so happy about the reaction to my Romain bot, I never in a million years thought that he would get over 30k chats. When I posted him I was honestly thinking ‘yea he’s going to flop but if one person likes him, I’m content.’ Seems like more than one person liked him and I am so happy there’s an audience for wholesome, healthy romance!

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

Of course, getting a shout out from Darcyz helped so much, I think most of the traction came from her. So again, thank you Darcyz! 🩷

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

You’re all made of sugar and spice and I want to keep you in my pocket forever
